description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house set on a spacious, well-manicured lot with a rectangular swimming pool in the backyard. The house features a white exterior with clean lines, multiple roof heights, and a combination of flat and gable roof sections. The property is surrounded by a hedge and includes a driveway with two parked cars, as well as several mature trees and landscaped bushes. The front facade is symmetrical, with a prominent entryway flanked by windows and a covered porch. The backyard is expansive, offering ample green space and a pool area, while the side and rear elevations reveal additional windows and outdoor living spaces. The overall design suggests a blend of contemporary and traditional architectural elements, emphasizing comfort and curb appeal.
description: A large, white modern house with a gable and flat roof, surrounded by landscaped greenery, a driveway, and a backyard pool. The property features symmetrical facades, multiple stories, and a spacious, manicured lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with two cars, symmetrical landscaping, and the house's prominent facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long driveway, side garden, and the backyard pool area with more visible green space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive backyard, swimming pool, and the back elevation of the house with multiple windows and outdoor areas.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the driveway, garage, and a partial view of the backyard and pool.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large windows and some asymmetrical side placements
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with steps, double doors, flanked by columns and decorative shrubbery
